title: Stanley Classic Legendary Thermal Flask 1.9L - Keeps 32 Hours Hot Or Cold - Stainless Steel Insulated Bottle - BPA-Free - Dishwasher Safe - Leakproof Lid Serves As A Cup - Hammertone Green
features: HOT OR COLD FOR 32 HOURS: Fill the 1.9L thermal flask with water, coffee, tea, or other drinks, whether at home, work, or outdoors. The double-wall vacuum insulation keeps your drinks hot or cold for 32 hours and iced for 160 hours.

EXTREMELY DURABLE: Our leak-proof vacuum bottle has withstood speeding bullets, 4000 ft drops and category 5 hurricanes; The iconic style and rugged durability of this insulated bottle means it’s made to go anywhere
BPA-FREE STAINLESS STEEL: All contact surfaces are guaranteed to be safe and BPA-FREE; The steel we use is 18/8, or grade 304, otherwise known as food-grade stainless steel
DISHWASHER SAFE: This insulated bottle designed to be cleaned easily; Every piece of this stainless steel vacuum flask is dishwasher safe, top rack only
BUILT FOR LIFE: 'Built for Life' has been the Stanley promise since 1913, manufacturing rugged, high-performance products that last a lifetime.
description: Product Description Our Stanley Classic Vacuum Bottle is made with superior insulation that keeps liquids (soup, coffee, tea) hot or cold for up to 23 hours. This large thermal flask is made with BPA-free materials, keeping its contents safe to consume. This stainless steel bottle is also leakproof and packable which makes it a welcome companion at any tailgate or camp out. Benefits Keeps hot or cold for 24 hours 18/8 Stainless Steel, BPA-free bottle Double-wall vacuum insulation Leakproof + packable Insulated lid doubles as cup Dishwasher safe About Stanley The Stanley brand has a rich 100+ year history. Born from inventor William Stanley Jr. who forever changed the way hot drinks were consumed, in 1913 he fused vacuum insulation and the strength of steel in one portable bottle, inventing the all-steel vacuum flasks we know and love today. In the century since, his vacuum flask evolved from concept to icon and has become an essential part of workdays, road trips and outdoor adventures. Box Contains 1 x Stanley Classic 1.9L Vacuum Bottle
